summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The compacted preflight artifact hydrated refs #79990 through #81470 only. Four security-route-candidate refs are quarantined with route_security as required by the validator. The remaining hydrated non-security PRs are independent inventory items with no shared canonical and no safe close/merge/fix action. The remaining unhydrated refs require fresh hydration before classification.
